scope: 赛情通知、赛事通知、获奖/入围名单与辅助材料的本地清洗批次
raw_material_policy: Raw files, original filenames that may reveal internal context, row samples, student names, schools, teacher names, IDs, and certificates are not included in this release package.

local_traceback.raw_archive_relative: 02_赛事资料库/05_赛事通知与获奖/01_原始材料/2026-06-26_赛事通知与获奖
local_traceback.cleaned_text_relative: 03_AI清洗知识库/02_清洗文本/03_赛事服务产品/赛事通知与获奖/2026-06-26_赛事通知与获奖

use_guidelines: Use this file as a safe index showing what local evidence exists, not as a public citation source.
For parent-facing answers, prefer official/public data_points and source_registry entries over this local batch.
For award/result discussion, use aggregate tendencies only and never expose names, schools, teacher names, student IDs, screenshots, or certificates.
If a user asks for a specific student/list row, require explicit authorization and use the private local archive, not GitHub data.
Legacy .doc items need manual conversion to .docx/PDF before full text cleaning.

legacy_issues.event_category: 青创赛/青少年科技创新大赛
